mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO income (ts_code, ann_date, f_ann_date, end_date, report_type, comp_type, basic_eps, diluted_eps, total_revenue, revenue, total_cogs, operate_cost, operate_profit, non_oper_income, non_oper_exp, total_profit, n_income, n_income_attr_p, minority_interest, adjust_profit, income_tax, n_income_yoy, dt_profit_yoy, sell_exp, admin_exp, financial_exp, rd_exp, impair_end_invest, impair_end_oper, invest_income, invest_income_inc, invest_income_dec, fairvalue_change_income, exchange_gain, asset_dispose_income, other_income, operate_n_income, credit_impair_loss, asset_impair_loss, bbit, bbit_yoy, operate_profit_income_yoy, update_flag) VALUES
(#{i.tsCode}, #{i.annDate}, #{i.fAnnDate}, #{i.endDate}, #{i.reportType}, #{i.compType}, #{i.basicEps}, #{i.dilutedEps}, #{i.totalRevenue}, #{i.revenue}, #{i.totalCogs}, #{i.operateCost}, #{i.operateProfit}, #{i.nonOperIncome}, #{i.nonOperExp}, #{i.totalProfit}, #{i.nIncome}, #{i.nIncomeAttrP}, #{i.minorityInterest}, #{i.adjustProfit}, #{i.incomeTax}, #{i.nIncomeYoy}, #{i.dtProfitYoy}, #{i.sellExp}, #{i.adminExp}, #{i.financialExp}, #{i.rdExp}, #{i.impairEndInvest}, #{i.impairEndOper}, #{i.investIncome}, #{i.investIncomeInc}, #{i.investIncomeDec}, #{i.fairvalueChangeIncome}, #{i.exchangeGain}, #{i.assetDisposeIncome}, #{i.otherIncome}, #{i.operateNIncome}, #{i.creditImpairLoss}, #{i.assetImpairLoss}, #{i.bbit}, #{i.bbitYoy}, #{i.operateProfitIncomeYoy}, #{i.updateFlag})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM income WHERE (ts_code, end_date, report_type) IN
(#{i.tsCode}, #{i.endDate}, #{i.reportType})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM income WHERE ts_code = #{tsCode} AND ann_date IS NOT NULL AND ann_date != '' AND ann_date <= #{tradeDate} AND report_type = '1' ORDER BY end_date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM income WHERE end_date >= #{startDate} AND n_income > total_revenue * 10 AND total_revenue > 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stock_basic b WHERE b.list_date < #{cutoffDate} AND b.list_status = 'L' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM income i WHERE i.ts_code = b.ts_code)
